title: Purchaser
description:
* Responsible to source, negotiate and purchase materials from both local and oversea vendors

* In charge of daily operational purchasing needs such as planning, issuing and following up on Purchase Orders' delivery and shipment schedules

* Reconcile our Sales Orders versus purchase quantities

* Facilitate stock-take and be responsible to tidy up inventory stores

* Suppliers' contacts in China an added advantage

* Resourceful, meticulous with strong vendor management skills

Requirements:

Min. 3 years of relevant experience, Diploma holder

postedCompany.description:
In 2020, Fairy Group Ventures successfully won the operating rights to SAFRA premises at 29 Carpenter Street.   This integrated F&B and Entertainment Hub at 29 Carpenter Street was first of its kind among the existing SAFRA clubhouses in Singapore to be operated by a single operator.


Below are the creative culinary brands and entertainment choices available at 29 Carpenter Street:


Level 1 – F&B Dining

JUwei 聚味老南洋咖啡店 nestled in the Clarke Quay area, invites you to gather, celebrate, and indulge in the vibrant flavors of Nanyang cuisine.  Whether you're reminiscing about a bygone era rich in culinary heritage, toasting to new beginnings, or simply savoring a perfectly brewed cup of traditional coffee, JUwei聚味老南洋 invites you to celebrate the joy of coming together.  Join us at JUwei聚味老南洋, where every meal is a celebration of nostalgia that extends beyond taste.


Level 2 – F&B Dining


二当家啦啦煲 Er Dang Jia LaLa Pot - a celebration of the sea’s finest bounty simmered in an exquisite broth.  At 二当家啦啦煲, we are passionate about delivering the freshest flavors and authentic experiences with handcrafted broth made from premium ingredients, slow-brewed to unlock deep, umami-rich flavors. Whether you're savoring a familiar favorite or discovering a new delight, 二当家啦啦煲 brings you closer to the joy of shared meals and the warmth of home.

Level 3 – Family Karaoke


聚 JU Party Box – Our exclusive private rooms elevate karaoke experiences with state-of- the-art sound systems and vast song selections. Whether it's a celebration, a night out with friends, or a team-building event, our private karaoke rooms offer a space to create unforgettable entertainment moments in the privacy of their own karaoke paradise!


Level 5 – Live House


聚歌 JUGe Entertainment, a go-to destination for live band performances featuring Mandarin and Cantonese genres. The energetic atmosphere of our venue, combined with the infectious enthusiasm of our performers, created a truly immersive experience that had all patrons singing along and enjoying every moment.


Level 7 – Lounge

  
Crystal Fairy - Our new lounge offers an inviting and chill atmosphere for patrons to unwind after a long day at work.  Unrivalled cocktails and bubbles meticulously crafted to tantalise insatiable appetite for an impeccable nightlife.
postedCompany.name: FAIRY GROUP VENTURES PTE. LTD.
